# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

listeners=PLAINTEXT://:9092,SSL://:9093,SASL_PLAINTEXT://:9094,SASL_SSL://:9095
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://your.broker.hostname:9092,SSL://your.broker.hostname:9093,SASL_PLAINTEXT://your.broker.hostname:9094,SASL_SSL://your.broker.hostname:9095
num.network.threads=5
num.io.threads=8
socket.send.buffer.bytes=1048576
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=1048576
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/data/kafka-logs
num.partitions=10
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2
log.retention.hours=168
log.retention.bytes=10737418240
log.segment.bytes=1073741824
log.cleaner.enable=true
log.cleaner.threads=2
log.cleaner.min.compaction.lag.ms=0
log.cleaner.delete.retention.ms=86400000
log.index.interval.bytes=4096
log.flush.interval.messages=9223372036854775807
log.flush.interval.ms=9223372036854775807
zookeeper.connect=zk1.yourdomain.com:2181,zk2.yourdomain.com:2181,zk3.yourdomain.com:2181/kafka
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000
broker.id=0

# Replication
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000
replica.socket.timeout.ms=30000
replica.fetch.max.bytes=10485760

# Internal Topic Configuration
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

# Security Configuration (Example placeholders - configure actual certs/passwords)
ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/secrets/kafka.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=your_keystore_password
ssl.key.password=your_key_password
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/secrets/kafka.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=your_truststore_password
ssl.client.auth=required
# ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=HTTPS # Recommended for inter-broker and client-broker SSL if hostnames match certs

# SASL Configuration (Example placeholders - configure actual JAAS/mechanisms)
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=PLAIN,SCRAM-SHA-512
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512
# Uncomment and configure sasl.jaas.config if using external JAAS configuration
# sasl.jaas.config=org.apache.kafka.common.security.plain.PlainLoginModule required \
#   username="broker" password="broker-password";
# For SCRAM-SHA-512, typically configured via a JAAS file or a configuration manager
# jaas.config.file=/etc/kafka/secrets/kafka_server_jaas.conf
# listeners=SASL_SSL://:9095

# JMX Exporter (Optional - for Prometheus monitoring)
# JMX_PORT=9999
# KAFKA_OPTS="-javaagent:/opt/kafka/libs/jmx_prometheus_javaagent-0.16.1.jar=9999:/etc/kafka/conf/jmx_exporter_config.yml"

# Auto create topics (set to false in production to prevent accidental topic creation)
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Controller configuration (for Kafka 2.8+) - if not using Zookeeper for metadata
# Uncomment and configure if you are moving to KRaft mode
# process.roles=broker,controller
# controller.quorum.voters=0@controller1.yourdomain.com:9093,1@controller2.yourdomain.com:9093,2@controller3.yourdomain.com:9093
# node.id=0
# controller.listener.name=CONTROLLER
# listeners=PLAINTEXT://:9092,CONTROLLER://:9093
# advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://your.broker.hostname:9092
# log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/data/kraft-combined-logs # Or separate for metadata logs
# zookeeper.connect= # This should be empty or commented out for KRaft
# zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms= # This should be empty or commented out for KRaft

# Inter-broker listener name (for clusters with multiple listeners)
# inter.broker.listener.name=SASL_SSL
